---
title: "Cumulus Community Shared Governance Establishment"
subtitle: "Minutes from Meeting #1"
date: 2026-07-01
author: Matthew A. Turner
---


- **Date:** July 1, 2026
- **Location:** 3318 Line Dr., Merced, CA 95348
- **Present:** Matthew Turner


## Call to Order

Matthew Turner called the meeting to order for the purpose of establishing the initial governance structure of the Cumulus Community and recording corresponding governance actions for the organizations it presently serves.

## Cumulus Community Resolution

It is hereby resolved that the Cumulus Community shall serve as the shared
leadership community for its affiliated organizations.

During the initial phase of development, the Cumulus Community hereby
establishes a three-member leadership task force drawn from its Board to
actively guide the managed co-evolution of its affiliated organizations.

This task force shall serve as the Board of Directors of Generation of
Participation in Democracy (GPD) and provide strategic governance for SubtleTea
Solutions (STS), consistent with the governing documents and legal status of
each organization.

The task force is constituted as a temporary structure to coordinate alignment,
learning, and execution across entities, and shall be adjusted, expanded, or
dissolved as needed once the mission of this phase is complete, with planning
for the next phase expected to begin as the shape of the solution becomes clear.

**The resolution was adopted.**


## Cumulus Community Resolution: Financial Separation

The Board recognizes the importance of maintaining appropriate financial
separation between its affiliated organizations.

During the initial phase of development, the Board shall establish policies
governing financial interactions between Generation of Participation in
Democracy (GPD) and SubtleTea Solutions (STS) to ensure transparency, legal
compliance, mission alignment, and appropriate organizational independence.

Until such policies are adopted, all financial interactions between affiliated
organizations shall be undertaken cautiously and documented in a manner
consistent with these principles.

**The resolution was adopted.**


## Cumulus Community Resolution: Appointment of Secretary

Matthew Turner appointed **Dr. Izabela Mauricio de Rezende** to serve as
**Secretary of the Board of Directors of the Cumulus Community**, effective
immediately, to serve until her resignation, removal, or the appointment of a
successor.

**The resolution was adopted.**


## GPD Board Resolution

The meeting further records that the initial members of the Cumulus Community
Board shall serve as the Board of Directors of **Generation of Participation in
Democracy (GPD)**, consistent with the corporation's governing documents.

**The resolution was adopted.**


## STS Governance Resolution

As sole owner of **SubtleTea Solutions (STS)**, Matthew Turner confirmed that,
during the organization's initial phase of development, STS shall receive
strategic governance from the members of the Cumulus Community Board.

**The resolution was adopted.**


## Adjournment

There being no further business, the meeting was adjourned.

---

## Approval

The above resolutions are hereby approved and adopted.

<br>

**Matthew Turner**

![](/images/mt-signature.jpg){width=270px height=50px}

**Date:** July 1, 2026

<br>

[**Return to _Governance_ Page**](/governance.qmd)
